title: Frame Consistency Challenges
concept: A major challenge is keeping objects, characters, and backgrounds consistent across frames, avoiding flickering or morphing artifacts between frames.

exercises.prompt: When you flip through a picture flip-book really fast, what makes it look like smooth motion instead of a jumpy mess?

options.text: Each page looks almost the same as the last, with tiny changes
Each page is a totally random new drawing
The pages are all blank except one

exercises.explain: Smooth motion happens when each frame stays consistent with the last one, only changing a tiny bit at a time!

cards.title: Why Do AI Videos Sometimes Look... Weird?
cards.body: Ever seen an AI-made video where a person's shirt changes color mid-walk, or a dog's tail flickers into a different shape? That's not a ghost — it's an AI struggling to keep things consistent from one frame to the next!

cards.title: Frame Consistency
cards.body: Frame consistency means keeping the same look for characters, objects, and backgrounds across every frame of a video. When AI loses consistency, things can 'flicker' (suddenly change) or 'morph' (melt into something else) between frames — which breaks the illusion of smooth, real motion.

cards.title: The Costume Change Problem
cards.body: Imagine an actor in a play who wears a red hat in scene one, but by scene two — without anyone noticing — the hat turns blue, then in scene three it's suddenly a hood! The audience would be so confused. AI video generators have to make sure every 'scene' (frame) remembers what happened in the last one, just like an actor must keep their costume the same throughout the play.

cards.title: The Flickering Dog
cards.body: An AI is asked to generate a short video of a dog running across a park. In frame 1, the dog has floppy ears and a brown coat. By frame 15, without any reason, the ears become pointy and the coat turns black for a moment before switching back. This sudden unexplained change is a classic consistency error — the AI 'forgot' what the dog looked like.

cards.title: Myth: AI Video Tools Always Remember Everything Perfectly
cards.body: Truth: Many AI video models generate frames using patterns and predictions, not a true persistent memory of every object. Without special techniques to track objects over time, small errors can build up frame by frame, causing flickering, morphing, or objects randomly changing shape, size, or color.

cards.title: Consistent vs. Inconsistent Frames
cards.body: Compare how the same character can either stay stable or fall apart across a sequence of frames.

left.text: Character keeps the same hair color, outfit, and face shape in every single frame of the video

right.text: Character's outfit color shifts, face slightly morphs, and background objects flicker between frames

exercises.prompt: What is 'frame consistency' in AI-generated video?

options.text: Making every frame a different color scheme for variety
Keeping characters, objects, and backgrounds looking the same across frames
Using only one single frame for the entire video
Making the video play faster than normal

exercises.explain: Frame consistency is about keeping the same appearance for people, objects, and scenery throughout a video, frame after frame.

exercises.prompt: Flickering and morphing happen when an AI video keeps everything perfectly consistent between frames.
exercises.explain: False! Flickering and morphing are actually signs that consistency has been LOST — not kept — between frames.

exercises.sentence: When an object suddenly and randomly changes shape between video frames, this is called ___.
exercises.explain: Morphing is when an object's shape unexpectedly shifts or melts into something else between frames, which is a common AI consistency error.

exercises.prompt: Which video clip is more likely to be a REAL, professionally filmed video rather than AI-generated?

options.text: A short clip where the actor's necklace changes shape and color every few seconds
A short clip where the actor's outfit and face stay exactly the same throughout
A short clip where the background trees flicker and swap positions randomly

exercises.explain: Real filmed videos naturally keep people and objects looking the same over time. Flickering and swapping details are telltale signs of AI struggling with consistency.

exercises.prompt: You're reviewing an AI-generated video of a girl walking her bike through a city street. In the first half, she wears a green backpack, but halfway through the clip it suddenly turns purple, then back to green a few seconds later. What AI challenge does this best demonstrate?

options.text: The AI is using too much color saturation on purpose
A frame consistency error, where the AI failed to keep the backpack's appearance stable across frames
The video was filmed in poor lighting conditions
The girl is wearing two different backpacks in real life

exercises.explain: This is a classic frame consistency error — the AI didn't correctly track and preserve the backpack's color across all the frames, causing it to flicker between green and purple.
